Make your beautiful one page website.

Free, easy, fast and direct online.



START FOR FREE MORE INFO
ONE PAGE WEBSITE

Turn your ideas into reality.


Without a website, no one can find your business online. If you have a website then your business exists. Do you want a website that actually delivers? You can make that website here. It meets the latest standards in terms of security, speed and mobile usage. With us, your website is in good hands.


GET STARTED

Your one page website will look great on any device

From small mobile smartphones to tablets and laptops, our web designs allows optimal viewing.




We believe that everyone deserves a beautiful one page website.

Free of charge, so no payment.


START FOR FREE

You get all this from us.

FREE

What’s included with your free website?


  • Website visible on own onepage.website domain
  • Website hosting for 1 website
  • Create website
  • 5 blocks for free per website
  • 8 images for free per gallery block
  • Publish Website
  • Google Analytics integration
  • Contact form responses (web and notification by email)
  • Your logo not on website
  • Mobile action buttons
  • onepage.website branding
  • Email & phone support


PLUS

What’s included with your € 1,- per month website?


  • Website visible on own domain
  • Website hosting for 1 website
  • Create website
  • Unlimited blocks per website
  • Unlimited images per gallery block
  • Publish Website
  • Google Analytics integration
  • Contact form responses (web and direct by email)
  • Your logo on website
  • Mobile action buttons
  • Remove onepage.website branding
  • Email & phone support


START FOR FREE
Explore Templates

This is why our customers are happy with us.

Easy to build
Make your own website in just a few clicks. Without any programming or coding knowledge.

Beautiful designs
Choose from many templates! This enables you to create beautiful websites in just a few minutes.

Great user experience, on any device
From small mobile smartphones to tablets and laptops, our web designs allows optimal viewing on any device.

Optimized for search engines
It isn't just about building search engine-friendly websites. Our builder makes your website better for people.

Custom Domain Name
Make it easy for your visitors to remember your website with a personalized domain.

Support team
We're here to help answer your questions. Our own support team maintains a near-perfect response rate!

See how it works.

How to create your website



01 ACCOUNT

Make an account on onepage.website.

02 TEMPLATE

Pick a template.

03 WEBSITE

Including pictures and texts.

04 FINISH

Boom! Your Website is online

Let us be your dream team.

We’ve got you covered



We know the web.

With more than 25 years in the industry, we’ve learned a thing or two about websites and what makes them work for your business.

We like to see you happy.

When you choose our webbuilder services, you become our friend. We help you until we meet or exceed your vision.

We know your time is valuable.

Our task is your website. Your will get it done fast and easly possible so you can stay focused on running your business.
